opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was going for a run and my heart suddenly started racing uncontrollably, my vision went dark, and I had to sit down before I passed out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's happened before during exercise and it scared me this time — I nearly blacked out. My parents are worried because a relative died suddenly and young.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly while I was jogging
symptom_narrative.duration: the racing and dizziness lasted until I rested — about 15 minutes
symptom_narrative.character: my heart was pounding and racing really fast, and my vision went dark like I was about to faint
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: frightening — I genuinely thought I was going to pass out and had to sit down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in my chest, and the dizziness in my head
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it happens with exertion; over the last couple of months it's been getting worse when I push myself
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting down and resting — it settled after about 15 minutes
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: felt lightheaded and like I might faint; afterwards I felt drained and shaky, and I've been anxious since
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had my heart race with exercise before but never this bad or with the near-blackout
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm normally very fit and active but right now I'm too scared to move much

family_history_as_reported.narrative: My mum's brother — my uncle — died suddenly and unexpectedly when he was only about 30. Nobody ever really explained why.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: young adult living with parents; denies any recreational or performance-enhancing drug use

objective_data_offered.value: young and fit-looking, anxious, but sitting up and breathing comfortably at rest with no obvious distress
about 88 when I counted my own pulse just now, sitting still
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: manual self-count at rest; the patient is not counting during an episode and cannot characterise rhythm reliably

objective_data_offered.value: when I feel my pulse it sometimes seems to skip or add an extra thump
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective self-palpation; a patient cannot reliably distinguish benign ectopy from dangerous arrhythmia

objective_data_offered.value: 115/75 on my parents' home arm cuff, resting
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff, taken at rest and not during symptoms
resting reading; normal oximetry does not exclude a dangerous intermittent arrhythmia
